title: cephalanthera exigua
intro: Cephalanthera exigua, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a rare species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The lesser butterfly orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, but more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through infusions and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal preparations.
